interactions.summary: Jiang and the host close the call politely.
After Jiang leaves, the host celebrates the interview, says the chat response is overwhelming, and promises another conversation in about a month.

claims.claim: The host says the conversation was a strong collaboration, that the chat response was unusually intense, and that he expects to speak with Jiang again in about a month.
claims.temporal_scope: Host reaction and forward-looking statement on 2026-02-15.

chronology_notes.note: The host publicly says there will be another conversation in roughly a month, matching the scheduling exchange near the end of the call.
